# init(url:)

**Initializer**

Creates a new [doc://com.apple.Link-Presentation/documentation/LinkPresentation/LinkMetadata] value for the specified URL.

## Declaration

```swift
nonisolated init(url: URL)
```

## Parameters

- **url**: The URL that the metadata is for.
